creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
I know this error. I guess you have lzmalib installed. (lzmalib is only needed by databases/tokyocabinet).
If you don't have installed this port run pkg delete -f lzmalib.
After this run pkg check -d. I guess some other port pulled lzmalib in an now will miss the library.
You only have to rebuild all port from the output of pkg check -d (you don't have to reinstall lzmalib).
